g.text: Spelling collapses to the channel's two attractors

text.style: font-size: 9.5px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #52514e

g.text: Whatever word you try to write through the video tokens, the emitted action decodes to ‘hold still’ (w22); whatever noise you inject decodes to ‘open gripper’ (w7). A rank-2-3 console has two buttons, not a lexicon.
